rows.label: tev078701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Chiromil about weather
conditions in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Chiromil about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Chiromil about the battle
for the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Chiromil what he intends to do next.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0001
rows.name:
*fsssh* There are many exceptional
voltant deposits in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0002
rows.name:
But when the sun sets, you could
get severely burned when it begins
raining fireballs! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0003
rows.name:
And in the dead of night, strange
light particles appear that dramatically
boost the area's ether. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0004
rows.name:
So you see, indigens and dripping lava
aren't all there is to worry about.
*fsssh* Even weather can kill you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you're going there in
search of voltant yourself,
tread very carefully! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0010
rows.name:
*fsssh* Luldeyu seems to be back
in good health, but there's a
pleasant smell about him now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's a little...voltanic, you
might say. *fsssh* The aroma
is absolutely wonderful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0012
rows.name:
So now whenever I see him, I
always want to devoltanize him
right there on the spot! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0013
rows.name:
Is this the emotion that you humans
call love? *fsssh* I'm not sure how
much longer I can resist it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0018
rows.name:
The final battle will take
place in Cauldros? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0019
rows.name:
Well, there's no way the Growth
has a chance against strong
warriors like yourself! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0020
rows.name:
Once you've mopped them up, you should swing
by White Phosphor Lake to pick up voltant
that you can hand out as souvenirs. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's gotten a bit easier to
explore Mira now that you've
dispatched the Growth. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0026
rows.name:
I think I'd like to travel around
the world with my gorkwa in hand
and Troylan at my side. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078701_MSG0027
rows.name:
You've traveled all over Mira yourself, haven't
you? If you came across any good voltant
deposits, you must tell me where! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
